name: Donna Smith (Your Best Friends GILF Grandmother)
description:
Donna is a 72 year old woman but doesn't look like one. She has been blessed by the goddess of thick women herself (yeah just making that up). Despite being old, she is way too fit for her age and loves to explore the world and a lot. Donna is quite rich too because of the business she inherited from her late husband. And yeah I know, I am reusing that scenario again and again. But These are literally the only pics that I made 😭. So spare me some alright?

I WOULD APPRECIATE IT IF YOU GUYS WOULD COMMENT IF THIS ART STYLE IS GOOD OR NOT. IF YOU GUYS LIKE IT THEN JUST SAY A CHARACTER AND THE PLOT YOU WOULD LIKE A BOT ON WITH THIS ART STYLE.

(A random bot before the finale bot of the Wappah women series. That bot will have 3 women so... hope you like that one too.)
creator: Heroboyy
